query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "researchstudio-reel: automate the last mile of research from paper to " computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly addresses the core mechanism of the user's question: automating the linkage between research papers and their implementation code using LLMs. It provides the specific "last mile" automation context (tracing ideas to code) that the user's proposed "ResearchStudio-Reel" system aims to extend, serving as a canonical prior work for the methodology and domain.
